title: Senior BI Analyst  BigQuery & Data Architecture US Shift
description: We are seeking a hands-on Senior BI Analyst with strong BigQuery expertise to ensure the accuracy, availability, and trustworthiness of business reporting and master data across systems.This is not a dashboard-only role.The ideal candidate must have deep hands-on experience with BigQuery, advanced SQL, and data modeling, and the ability to understand how data flows across systems.
